query: Who is the current CEO of OpenAI?
answerA: The current CEO of OpenAI is **Sam Altman**. He is also a co-founder of the company.

answerB: As of 2026, Sam Altman is the CEO of OpenAI. He returned to the position after a brief interim, with Mira Murati serving as CTO and Greg Brockman as President. This leadership structure was announced in the initial board changes.
